name: Digital Certificate Purchase
description: Detects the purchase of digital certificates, which may be used for malicious activities such as signing malware, evading detection, or impersonating legitimate entities.

prompts.prompt: Digital certificate purchase detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **User** {user}, **Product** {product}, **Transaction ID** {transaction_id}, **Details** {details}. Investigate this activity to determine if the certificate purchase is legitimate or for malicious purposes.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the certificate purchase event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user or account making the purchase.

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description: The transaction ID of the purchase.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Any relevant details about the certificate purchase.
